title: Gerascanthus latifolius
taxonomy: Gerascanthus latifolius is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It belongs to the genus Gerascanthus, which is a group of flowering plants known for their unique characteristics. The species Gerascanthus latifolius is further classified into the subfamily Rauvolfioideae. This classification places it within the order Gentianales, which includes several other families of flowering plants. The exact classification of Gerascanthus latifolius is subject to ongoing research and updates in the botanical community.
